'''Ka-Tu-Un''' was a male [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] Force-adept who lived during the later years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. He trained as a member of the Cerean [[Ner Yan]] tradition, translating into [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] as "mind chord." This group trained their minds to attune to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], linking their minds together.

==Biography==

When the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaded the galaxy, Ka-Tu-Un was one of a number of refugees trying to flee [[Druckenwell/Legends|Druckenwell]]. He tried to escape onboard the [[MOD-17 container freighter]], ''[[Chilastra]]'', but realized that he had been mistaken by the invaders as a member of the [[New Jedi Order]].<ref name="HotI" />

While attempting to escape the Yuuzhan Vong, Ka-Tu-Un was sold out by [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Vlohei]], which led to his capture and interrogation by the Yuuzhan Vong.<ref name="HotI" />

==Behind the scenes==
In the ''Hive of the Infidel'' article, Ka-Tu-Un is presented as a Force-adept of the Ner Yan tradition with no formal affiliation to the New Jedi Order as led by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. However, the [[Wizards of the Coast]] preview described him as a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]].<ref name="HotI" />
